parameters.code:
# Gelen takip event'ini çözümle
# URL: webhook/email-takip?cid=XXX&event=open|click&action=interested|...

import urllib.parse

for item in items:
    query = item['json']['query']
    params = urllib.parse.parse_qs(query)
    
    customer_id = params.get('cid', [None])[0]
    event = params.get('event', [None])[0]
    action = params.get('action', [None])[0]
    
    item['json']['customer_id'] = customer_id
    item['json']['event'] = event
    item['json']['action'] = action
    
    # Event tipine göre aşama belirle
    stage_map = {
        'open': 'email_acildi',
        'click': 'ilgilendi',
    }
    if action == 'interested':
        item['json']['hedef_asama'] = 'ilgilendi'
    elif action == 'followup_click':
        item['json']['hedef_asama'] = 'ilgilendi'
    elif action == 'offer_view':
        item['json']['hedef_asama'] = 'teklif_gonderildi'
    elif event == 'open':
        item['json']['hedef_asama'] = 'email_acildi'
    else:
        item['json']['hedef_asama'] = 'ilgilendi'

return items
